<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Creates a remote responder handler.

## Import

```ts
import { remoteResponderHandler } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters";
```

## Signature

```ts
function remoteResponderHandler(
	operation: string,
	handle: RemoteResponderHandler<TRequest, TResponse>,
): RemoteResponderHandlerDefinition<TRequest, TResponse>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `operation` | `string` | Remote operation descriptor. |
| `handle` | `RemoteResponderHandler<TRequest, TResponse>` | Handle for the remote responder operation. |

## Returns

The remote responder handler result.

## Example

```ts
import { remoteResponderHandler } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/adapters/bridge.ts`
